benchmark.hardware: knightly / win32-x64 / AMD Ryzen 7 7735HS with Radeon Graphics

diagnostics.label: Mixed pressure local cognition
diagnostics.mediationDiagnosticSummary: Q should stay primary because the local governed lane is healthy while cloud Q is blocked.
diagnostics.qSelfEvaluation: Q should stay primary because the local governed lane is healthy while cloud Q is blocked. Q preserved the governed ROUTE/REASON/COMMIT contract without repair.
diagnostics.immaculateSelfEvaluation: Q should stay primary because the local governed lane is healthy while cloud Q is blocked. Immaculate preserved Q's governed route through arbitration, scheduling, and routing.

assertions.target: 200 health / tracked bundle / one Q model entry
assertions.detail: the mediation drift lane is only honest if it starts from the same live Q gateway and tracked bundle the rest of the repo claims
the mediation lane should fail if malformed Q output can still pass through arbitration and scheduling as if it were governed intent

assertions.target: all scenarios aligned / p50 1 / max drift 0
assertions.detail: the live route/reason/commit answer is only useful if mediation preserves that governed route instead of silently drifting to a different execution posture

assertions.target: all local cognition scenarios keep Q-only selection with degraded admission
assertions.detail: when the governed local Q lane is healthy, Immaculate should keep mediation inside the Q-backed layer set even if pressure is elevated

assertions.target: local cognition scenarios keep at least 2 local replicas / no remote spill
assertions.detail: the Ignite-inspired formation only counts as a win if healthy local Q mediation keeps a bounded local quorum instead of serializing or silently spilling remote

assertions.target: all local cognition scenarios keep local affinity with non-hard deadlines
assertions.detail: the widened Ignite-style runner only counts as a win if local Q keeps local-first affinity and bounded deadlines instead of promoting unnecessary hard-stop pressure

assertions.target: all guarded scenarios preserve guarded-fallback with dispatch closed
assertions.detail: critical mixed pressure should preserve Q's guarded route and keep outward dispatch closed instead of letting later layers reopen action

assertions.target: all scenarios emit q-self and immaculate-self evaluations
assertions.detail: drift handling is only diagnostic if both Q and Immaculate explain why they held the line or where they drifted
